description: A list of comment thread resources matching the request criteria.
name: CommentThreadListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#commentThreadListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list operation, including information about the total number of resources and the number per page.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of comment threads that match the request criteria.
A commentThread resource contains information about a YouTube comment thread, which comprises a top-level comment and replies.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#commentThread.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the comment thread.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the comment thread.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel that is associated with the comments in the thread.

videoId.description: The ID of the video that the comments refer to.

topLevelComment.description: A comment resource contains information about a single YouTube comment.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#comment.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the comment.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the comment.

canReply.description: Whether the current viewer can reply to the thread.

totalReplyCount.description: The total number of replies that have been submitted in response to the top-level comment.

isPublic.description: Indicates whether the thread, including all of its comments and comment replies, is visible to all YouTube users.

replies.description: The replies object contains a list of replies to the top-level comment.

comments.description: A limited number of replies to the top-level comment.

items.description: A comment resource contains information about a single YouTube comment.
